summary: v5.1 adds four metric dimensions (end-to-end response time, inter-token p50/p95, multi-context-length sweep, INT3 column) plus three v5 follow-ups: 2A suffix chunked prefill (SKIPPED — interleave-decode unsafe for fresh user prompts), 2B per-block last-position logit (SHIPPED with caveat — saves the suffix forward pass but client-visible TTFT improvement is muted by FastAPI/uvicorn streaming overhead), 2C expose --block-kv-cache on `squish run` CLI (SHIPPED).

tooling.squish_version: 9.14.0 + v4 + v4.1 + v4.2 + v5 + v5.1 (branch perf/v5.1-metrics-and-suffix)

configurations.squish_pkv: python -m squish.server ... --prompt-kv-cache DIR (v4.2 whole-prompt SHA-256 path)
configurations.squish_block: python -m squish.server ... --block-kv-cache DIR --block-kv-size 64 (v5 + v5.1 per-block logit)
configurations.squish_block_int3: same as squish_block but with INT3 model

measurement_protocol.report: median + min + max + p95 + stddev (raw per-run values in runs/<UTC-timestamp>/raw.json)
measurement_protocol.tie_threshold: Winner column awarded only when delta exceeds 5%.

scenarios_v5_1.p75: 75-token prompt (≈ 57 tokens of user content + chat template) — matches v4.2 short-prompt benchmark.
scenarios_v5_1.p4000: 4000-token prompt (≈ 4053 tokens after chat template) — agent / coding-assistant target.

metrics_v5_1.ttft_s: Cold TTFT in seconds (max_tokens=1). For cache-enabled configs this becomes warm-cache-hit TTFT after the first send.
metrics_v5_1.e2e_200tok_s: End-to-end response time for a 200-token completion.
metrics_v5_1.itl_p50_ms: Median inter-token gap (ms), excluding the first chunk = TTFT.

T2A_suffix_chunked_prefill.reason: Even on a block-cache hit, the suffix tokens are part of the user's prompt. Interleave-decoding them would emit non-response tokens (same restriction as v5 Goal A on fresh prompts).
T2A_suffix_chunked_prefill.follow_up: v5.2: speculative prefill — yield mid-prefill samples and verify/retract on mismatch.

T2B_per_block_last_logit.decision_gate: < 30 ms target: NOT MET. Server-side ttft drops from ~250 ms to ~145 ms (correct: one fewer forward pass), but FastAPI/uvicorn streaming-response overhead adds another ~100 ms that v4.2 PromptKVStore's prefix-character-yield bypasses architecturally. Implementation is correct, tests pass, fast-path verified to fire (server trace). Kept as a foundation; v5.2 follow-up: bypass stream_generate setup for cache hits.
